channel.title: MAVLink on muioo blog
channel.description: Recent content in MAVLink on muioo blog

item.title: 【MAVLink】CRC校验算法分析
item.description:
CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

Project Overview

This is a MAVLink v2 protocol CRC analysis project. The goal is to understand and verify the CRC checksum calculation used in MAVLink message frames.

Reference Materials

  • 参考资料.txt — Contains links to MAVLink CRC documentation:
    • https://mavlink.io/zh/guide/crc.html#mavlink-crc (CRC algorithm details)
    • https://mavlink.io/zh/guide/serialization.html#crc_extra (CRC_EXTRA mechanism)

Data

  • 消息数据.csv — Captured MAVLink v2 frames with pre-parsed fields. The CSV columns are:
    • 时间, 序号, 帧起始标志, 有效载荷长度, 序列号, 系统ID, 组件ID, 消息ID, 消息名称
    • 帧头信息, 载荷数据, CRC低字节, CRC高字节, CRC校验位, 帧长度, 原始帧数据

Key Protocol Details

  • All frames use MAVLink v2 (start flag 0xFD)
  • System ID = 1, Component ID = 1
  • The CRC-16/X.25 algorithm is used, with a message-specific CRC_EXTRA seed byte appended to the payload before computing the checksum
  • The CSV file is encoded in a Chinese locale (GBK/GB2312) — use encoding='gbk' or similar when reading with pandas/Python

Working with the Data

When writing Python scripts to analyze this data:

  • Read the CSV with pd.read_csv(..., encoding='gbk') or encoding_errors='replace'
  • Hex fields (消息ID, CRC bytes, raw frames) are stored as strings with 0x prefix or plain hex
  • The 原始帧数据 column contains the complete raw frame in hex — useful for verifying CRC calculations end-to-end
